gameContext.customOverride:
Output ONE token: UP|DOWN|LEFT|RIGHT|WAIT
Scoring: collect tablewb (+1). Win: clear all emptytable and tablewb. Lose: all leavingavatar gone; exit count reaches 0; timeout. Mechanics: collect tablewb to transform, collect ground to transform, collect singlefront to transform, collect singleback to transform, collect singleleft to transform, collect singleright to transform.
